2. location of landing (wd:P1158 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "landing site"), also known as "landing location", "landing site":
  - location where the craft landed
3. inception (wd:P571 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "formed at"), also known as "built", "commenced on date", "commencement date", "completed", "composed", etc.:
  - time when an entity begins to exist; for date of official opening use P1619
4. location of formation (wd:P740 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "formed in"), also known as "comes from", "formation location", "formation place", "formed in", "founded in", etc.:
  - location where a group or organization was formed
5. ranking (wd:P1352 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "placing"), also known as "peak position", "place", "placing", "position", "rank":
  - subject's ordinal position as qualitatively evaluated relative to other members of a group
6. notable work (wd:P800 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "founded"), also known as "artwork", "author of", "bibliography", "books by", "creator of", etc.:
  - notable scientific, artistic or literary work, or other work of significance among subject's works
7. dissolved, abolished or demolished date (wd:P576 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "demolished"), also known as "abolished", "abolishment date", "ceased date", "ceased on", "ceased publication", etc.:

8. location (wd:P276 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "place held"), also known as "based in", "city", "exact location", "from", "held by", etc.:
  - location of the object, structure or event; use P131 to ... entities; use P7153 for locations associated with the object
9. narrative location (wd:P840 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "place set in"), also known as "location of narrative", "narrative set in", "place of setting", "place set in", "playing in", etc.:
  - the narrative of the work is set in this location
10. made from material (wd:P186 as wdt/p/ps/pq/pr/wdtn/psn/pqn/prn/psv/pqv/prv, matched via "built from"), also known as "be made in", "built from", "built out of", "constructed from", "constructed out of", etc.:
  - material the subject or the object is made of or derived from (do not confuse with P10672 which is used for processes)
